title: Girl from Second Impression and Mana from GoS1
display_title: Girl from Second Impression and Mana from GoS1
wikitext:
[]: Girl from Second Impression & Mana from GoS1             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 01, 2007 6:20 pm What exactly is the girl (dunno her name, all I know is she wears glasses and has long black hair) from Second Impression like and how does she differ from Mana of GoS1?? For instance, what I personally like about Mana (though I don't think she's right for Shinji ;)) is she seems to be the balance between Asuka and Rei's personalites, she's more in the middle. In general, what's that girl's personality like? Is she the studious type or something (looks that way) I would check if Purlace has info about that, but the site closed today... :cry: (What I don't understand is couldn't all the information/etc of the site still be up even if it's closed/not updated anymore?? I've seen sites do that...)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 01, 2007 6:29 pm Mayumi, the one with the angel core

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 01, 2007 7:33 pm Don't forget that blonde girl.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:13 pm And let's not forget about Haruko! ... ... !

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:23 pm [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] Evangelion 2nd Impression Sega Saturn game...i think... The game part was for the most part...stupid... the reason it was cool was because of the animation sequences... Mayumi was basically a female version of Shinji and unfortunately had an Angel inside her...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:27 pm I bought the game but i was too excited to see that it was for Sega so I cant play it. whats the game about

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:47 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: I bought the game but i was too excited to see that it was for Sega so I cant play it.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:51 pm NAveryW wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: I bought the game but i was too excited to see that it was for Sega so I cant play it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 01, 2007 9:01 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: like its inside her or she keeps it like a pet rock?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jan 01, 2007 9:06 pm NAveryW wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: like its inside her or she keeps it like a pet rock?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 01, 2007 9:07 pm Then you probably shouldn't trust me, because that's where I got my information XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 01, 2007 11:22 pm Well I was reading hints/info about the game and it's one of those where you chose the paths you can take. Apparently you can come to a decision of defeating the Angel while trying to save Mayumi and killing Mayumi, and supposedly one of the choices (saving her I guess?) leads to a scene of her trying to commit suicede :shock: Female version of Shinji, huh? O RLY?? ...Guess I'll have to play it first to see who I like better, her or Mana.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Jan 02, 2007 1:20 am Shouldn't be too hard to top, as Mana is a shitty character. Anyway, if you don't have a Saturn and not playing a hard copy of the game, good fucking luck trying to get a Saturn emuator to work. Those things are very hard to emulate.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 02, 2007 3:10 am I was able to find and game, but the emulator's another story (the one that it came with doesn't seem to work...Oh well, I'm sure I can find one that DOES somewhere...) Do you think Mana's a shitty character because of how she acts towards Shinji (using him/is a spy and doesn't come clean about it) or that she's just not really given a personality?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Jan 02, 2007 4:57 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Do you think Mana's a shitty character because of how she acts towards Shinji (using him/is a spy and doesn't come clean about it) or that she's just not really given a personality?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Jan 02, 2007 9:28 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Do you think Mana's a shitty character because of how she acts towards Shinji (using him/is a spy and doesn't come clean about it) or that she's just not really given a personality?

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Sun Jan 07, 2007 9:42 pm are there any eva games that are good?

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Jan 08, 2007 1:20 pm The Super Robot Taisen series. Other then that... ... ... Rei Strip Poker?

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09, 2007 7:19 am i still liked the one on the n64 however it was kinda cheating that when i pressed the right button, that it exactly says wrong O_O (the most irritating level). Also liked the story of girlfriend of steel 1 and i dont think Mana is a shitty char ^^. I like when Shinji gets embarrased and Asuka being so jalouse. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 11, 2007 12:18 am Divergence split to Off-topic .
